expectations.text: Uses TextInput directly with label prop (not FormField wrapper)
expectations.evidence: TextInput components with label prop, no FormField
Uses variant="emphasis" for primary button — this is for hero CTAs not forms

expectations.text: Button row uses Flex with gap, not margin on individual buttons
expectations.evidence: Nested Flex with gap="200" for button row

expectations.text: Buttons are left-aligned (no justifyContent="end" on button row)
expectations.evidence: No justifyContent on button row, left-aligned
